title: Broadcast Desk Update Response
description: Students open a teacher-created Broadcast Desk Update, follow the instructions, and submit required production evidence or response.
studentTask: Open the assigned Broadcast Desk Update, follow the instructions, and submit the required media evidence or response.
evidenceRequired: Submitted media link or uploaded file

rubric.description: Complete, polished, on time, and clearly meets or extends the stated requirements.
Complete and meets the stated requirements.
Partially complete or missing required evidence.
Attempted but incomplete, unclear, or not functional.
Not submitted.

reflectionPrompt: What did you contribute, what worked, and what would you improve next time?

title: B-Roll Sequence
description: Students capture or collect a short sequence of B-roll clips and submit a simple edited sequence or media evidence according to teacher requirements.
studentTask: Capture or collect a short sequence of B-roll clips and submit a simple edited sequence or media evidence according to teacher requirements.
evidenceRequired: Exported B-roll sequence or hosted link

rubric.description: Complete, polished, on time, and clearly meets or extends the stated requirements.
Complete and meets the stated requirements.
Partially complete or missing required evidence.
Attempted but incomplete, unclear, or not functional.
Not submitted.

reflectionPrompt: Which shot best helped tell the story, and why?

title: Interview Setup and Framing
description: Students practice setting up an interview shot with appropriate framing, sound, and visual clarity.
studentTask: Set up and record an interview sample using class framing and audio expectations.

rubric.description: Complete, polished, on time, and clearly meets the production requirements.
Complete and meets the stated requirements.
Partially complete or missing required evidence.
Attempted but incomplete or unclear.
Not submitted.

reflectionPrompt: What setup choice most improved the interview quality?

title: News Package
description: Students create a short news package that combines narration, interviews or natural sound, and supporting visuals.
studentTask: Create a short news package that communicates a clear story for a school or class audience.
evidenceRequired: Final news package export or link

rubric.description: Complete, polished, on time, and clearly meets the production requirements.
Complete and meets the stated requirements.
Partially complete or missing required evidence.
Attempted but incomplete or unclear.
Not submitted.

reflectionPrompt: How did your edit make the information clear for the audience?

title: Studio Role Practice
description: Students practice a studio production role and document the responsibilities, communication, and evidence connected to that role.
studentTask: Practice an assigned studio role and document what the role requires during production.

rubric.description: Complete, polished, on time, and clearly meets the production requirements.

Partially complete or missing required evidence.

title: Short Documentary Segment
description: Students produce a short documentary-style segment about a teacher-approved subject.
studentTask: Plan, capture, and edit a short documentary-style segment with a clear subject and story direction.

rubric.description: Complete, polished, on time, and clearly meets the production requirements.

Partially complete or missing required evidence.

title: Final Video Portfolio Piece
description: Students select, revise, and submit a final video piece for portfolio or showcase consideration.
studentTask: Choose a strong video production piece, revise it for quality, and submit it with portfolio reflection.
evidenceRequired: Final video export or hosted link
